title: Crispy Uruguayan Peanut Cookies Stone-Bowl-Dolsot
description: A briny, crispy Uruguayan dish featuring peanuts and cookies, served in a stone bowl. Perfect for a weeknight ovo-vegetarian-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: dolsot stone bowl
ingredients.notes: available at Korean or Asian markets

instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, baking soda, and salt.
Add in the peanut butter and mix until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough to about 1/4 inch thickness.
Cut into desired shapes using a cookie cutter.
Place on the prepared baking sheet and bake for 12-15 minutes.
While the cookies are baking, heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add in the peanuts and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
In the dolsot stone bowl, mix together the peanut cookies, peanuts, and a pinch of salt.
Drizzle with water and serve immediately.
